name: myslide
description: Create professional AWS-themed PPTX presentations with dark gradient backgrounds, SVG architecture diagrams, and conversational slide editing. Uses AWS reInvent design system (Amazon Ember fonts, orange/magenta/purple palette, content card patterns).
author: jesamkim

skills.name: myslide
skills.description: AWS-themed PPTX presentation creator with dark gradient backgrounds, SVG diagrams, content card layouts, and conversational editing. Trigger on: AWS presentation, AWS slides, myslide, AWS themed deck, make slides, create presentation
